exercises.name: Prisoner Squats
exercises.cues: Standing with hands behind your head, squat with heels pressed into ground to 90° and back up.

exercises.name: V-Situps
exercises.cues: Make sure to keep arms and legs long, bringing arms overhead as you go down.

exercises.name: 7 Antagonistic Special - BB Behind the Back

circuits.name: WU A
circuits.subtitle:
Jog-skip 400m
Static Stretch (prescribed)
Sprint Drills (A & B) x 2 X 30m
Dynamic Flexibility (A & B)
Buildup Runs x 3-4 x 20-40m

Dynamic Flexibility (A)
Buildup Runs x 2-3 x 20-30m

circuits.name: Mobility Series B
circuits.subtitle: Spacing: 1 foot for first two, 3 feet for remaining

circuits.name: 1. Acceleration
circuits.subtitle: 15-25 Bouts of 10 seconds at very high wheel resistance

circuits.name: 2. Speed Development
circuits.subtitle: 10-15 Bouts of 20-30 seconds at high resistance

circuits.name: 3. Special Speed Endurance
circuits.subtitle: 8-10 Bouts of 45-60 seconds at medium to high resistance
